'''Jorm Whistler Mackenni''', also known by the warrior-name '''Twister''', was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] serving in the forces of the [[Empire of the Hand]] many years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Whistler was [[Human/Legends|Human]], although it is not entirely certain whether he was a colonist from a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], or perhaps a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]. By the time of the liberation of [[Kariek]], he had been a stormtrooper in [[Aurek Company]] of the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st Legion]] for six years, the last two of which he had spent in command of the four-man squad designated [[Unit Aurek-Seven]].

In the course of their attempt to breach the defenses of [[the Warlord]]'s fortress, Whistler and Aurek-Seven encountered a group of native [[Eickarie]] freedom-fighters, including the warrior named [[Su-mil]]. After Su-mil proved instrumental in securing the capture of the fortress and the overthrow of the Warlord, Whistler invited him to join the Imperial military, and when he left the military soon after, the Eickarie replaced him as Aurek-Seven's leader.
